en.headline: You’re not alone with your policies.
en.vision: Helping households that already have coverage understand and use that coverage when it matters.
en.lead: Panda Studio is the consumer brand of Hangzhou Panda Studio Technology Co., Ltd. — a one-person technology company building practical software for families who already hold insurance policies.

zh.headline: 你不是一个人在管你的保单
zh.vision: 让已有保障的家庭，在关键时刻读得懂、用得上自己的保障。
zh.lead: 潘达工房是杭州潘达工房科技有限公司的消费级品牌。我们是一家一人公司，为已有保单的家庭做务实的软件工具。

en.intro: Panda Studio builds consumer software. We are a one-person limited company (OPC) focused on tools that help households understand coverage they already own — not on selling insurance.
en.whyLead: Two real incidents showed the gap between “having a policy” and “being able to use it when it matters.”
en.why1: The family held two accident policies with different roles. At the clinic it was unclear which hospital tier applied — one case was settled by goodwill, which is not a plan for next time.
en.why2: When the person who manages the policies is the patient, nobody else can read exclusions and care paths from dense PDFs under stress.
matrix: PolicyPal (保管) — primary product; App ID studio.panda.policy
FortuneDiary / 富竹 — longer-term personal finance tools

zh.intro: 潘达工房做消费级软件。我们是一人有限责任公司（OPC），专注帮已有保单的家庭把保障读懂、用上——不做保险销售。
zh.whyLead: 两次真实经历，让我们看见「有保单」和「关键时刻用得上」之间的鸿沟。
zh.why1: 家里配了两份意外险，职责分明；真崴脚时分工早已记不清，社区医院是否符合「二级及以上」也难即时判断——那一次靠通融，但不能指望下次。
zh.why2Title: 契机二 · 配偶孕期上感
zh.why2: 管保单的人倒下时，特需路径与妊娠免责难判断；PDF 在手机里，紧急时刻翻不动。
matrix: 保管（PolicyPal）— 当前主推；App ID studio.panda.policy
订阅闹钟 — 已立项的下一款
财富日记 / 富竹 — 中长期规划中的理财工具

en.name: PolicyPal
en.summary: A local-first app to import policy PDFs, keep structured records on your device, and ask a bring-your-own-key (BYOK) model about the policies you link — with costs you control.
en.role: AI policy companion · not a licensed broker; we do not sell coverage or file claims for you
helpEase: Import on-device policy PDFs into a local archive
See coverage highlights at a glance
Ask about hospitals, conditions, and care paths
Keep multi-turn chat tied to the same policy
Avoid flipping dozens of PDF pages in a hurry
helpTrust: Policies and chats stay on your phone
No account and no developer backend that collects your data
BYOK — you bring the model API key and pay the provider
AI answers are for reference; insurer wording prevails
Key stored with platform secure storage where implemented
en.disclaimer: PolicyPal is AI-assisted tool software. Hangzhou Panda Studio Technology Co., Ltd. is not an insurer, insurance broker, insurance agent, or claims adjuster. The app does not sell insurance or file claims on your behalf.
en.copyrightNote: Android software copyright registered in mainland China (certificate on file; not published here).

zh.name: 保管
zh.summary: 本地优先：导入本机保单 PDF、在设备上建立档案，并用自带密钥（BYOK）的大模型围绕已关联保单问答——费用由你自行控制。
zh.role: AI 保单伙伴 · 非持牌经纪、非代投代赔
helpEase: 导入本机 PDF，建立本地保单档案
列表摘要一眼看清保障重点
按医院、病情、就医路径追问
多轮对话始终围绕同一份保单
紧急时刻少翻几十页条款
helpTrust: 无账号、无自研后端采集用户数据
BYOK：自带模型 Key，费用自控
AI 解读仅供参考，以保司核赔为准
API Key 使用系统级安全存储（已实现处）
zh.disclaimer: 「保管」是 AI 辅助工具软件。杭州潘达工房科技有限公司不是保险公司、保险经纪机构、保险代理人或理赔机构。本应用不提供投保、销售或理赔代办服务。
zh.copyrightNote: Android 版已获中国大陆软件著作权登记（证书存档，不在此公开扫描件）。
